common.footer: Built with care for women returning to work

hero.subtitle: AI-powered platform designed to help women restart their careers with confidence. Discover opportunities tailored to your unique journey.

resume.title: Smart Resume Analysis
resume.desc: AI-powered resume review that highlights your transferable skills and career gap strengths.

bridge.title: Skill Bridge Courses
bridge.desc: Curated upskilling paths to fill gaps and stay competitive in today's job market.

returnship.title: Returnship Programs
returnship.desc: Access exclusive returnship and re-entry programs from companies that value your experience.

cta.title: Ready to Restart?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of women who have successfully returned to their careers.

reframing.title: A Career Break Isn't a <1>Step Back</1>.
reframing.description:
Whether you took time for family, education, or personal growth, your skills didn't disappear. You gained emotional intelligence, resilience, and perspective.

The Sanctuary uses Gemini AI to help you translate these life experiences into professional strengths that top Indian companies are actively looking for.
reframing.intent: of women intend to return to work
